title: Macro expand pass wired into type-check context

source.subject: feat(compiler): extend macro expand and type-check context wiring

body:
## Outcome

Extend macro expand and type-check context wiring.

## Context

- Workstream **analysis-pipeline** — compiler pipeline and api.json spine.
- Contributes to deliverable **Composition HIR & macro expansion** (`v02-composition-macros-hir`).
- Macro work follows platform-spec **language-meta/macros** semantics (registry, expand pass, resolver re-resolve).

## Platform specification

- Implements [Macros](https://beskid-lang.org/platform-spec/language-meta/macros/) (`/platform-spec/language-meta/macros/`) *(required)*

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`760098d`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/760098d) — feat(compiler): extend macro expand and type-check context wiring
